testcase.classname: Phase 2 Skills - Integration Tests › Skills Service - Phase 2 Skills Loading › Progressive Loading Workflow
testcase.name: should demonstrate Tier 1 (Discovery) - metadata only loading

testcase.classname: Phase 2 Skills - Integration Tests › Skills Service - Phase 2 Skills Loading › Progressive Loading Workflow
testcase.name: should demonstrate Tier 2 (Invocation) - full content loading

testcase.classname: Phase 2 Skills - Integration Tests › Skills Service - Phase 2 Skills Loading › Progressive Loading Workflow
testcase.name: should use cache on subsequent Tier 2 loads

testcase.classname: Phase 2 Skills - Integration Tests › Skills Service - Phase 2 Skills Loading › Progressive Loading Workflow
testcase.name: should bypass cache when useCache is false

testcase.classname: Phase 2 Skills - Integration Tests › Skills Service - Phase 2 Skills Loading › Cache Management
testcase.name: should cache multiple Phase 2 skills independently

testcase.classname: Phase 2 Skills - Integration Tests › Skills Service - Phase 2 Skills Loading › Cache Management
testcase.name: should clear all cached Phase 2 skills

testcase.classname: Phase 2 Skills - Integration Tests › Skills Service - Phase 2 Skills Loading › Cache Management
testcase.name: should generate unique hashes for different skills

testcase.classname: Phase 2 Skills - Integration Tests › Skills Service - Phase 2 Skills Loading › Cross-Skill Reference Validation
testcase.name: should verify productivity-patterns can be referenced by multiple agents

testcase.classname: Phase 2 Skills - Integration Tests › Skills Service - Phase 2 Skills Loading › Cross-Skill Reference Validation
testcase.name: should verify task-management references are valid

testcase.classname: Phase 2 Skills - Integration Tests › Skills Service - Phase 2 Skills Loading › Cross-Skill Reference Validation
testcase.name: should verify user-preferences schema is complete for agent usage

testcase.classname: Phase 2 Skills - Integration Tests › Skills Service - Phase 2 Skills Loading › Error Handling
testcase.name: should throw error for non-existent skill

testcase.classname: Phase 2 Skills - Integration Tests › Skills Service - Phase 2 Skills Loading › Error Handling
testcase.name: should throw error for invalid skill path

testcase.classname: Phase 2 Skills - Integration Tests › Skills Service - Phase 2 Skills Loading › Error Handling
testcase.name: should handle missing SKILL.md gracefully

testcase.classname: Phase 2 Skills - Integration Tests › Skills Service - Phase 2 Skills Loading › Batch Loading Performance
testcase.name: should load all Phase 2 skills in parallel

testcase.classname: Phase 2 Skills - Integration Tests › Skills Service - Phase 2 Skills Loading › Batch Loading Performance
testcase.name: should efficiently load metadata for all Phase 2 skills

testcase.classname: Phase 2 Skills - Integration Tests › Skills Service - Combined Phase 1 + Phase 2 Loading
testcase.name: should load all 10 skills (4 Phase 1 + 6 Phase 2)

testcase.classname: Phase 2 Skills - Integration Tests › Skills Service - Combined Phase 1 + Phase 2 Loading
testcase.name: should verify Phase 2 skills are accessible while Phase 1 may be protected
